content.en:
Subsequently.

One of Ye Tian's copy bodies went out, returning to the outside world with these Eternal Demon Crystals and some resources, and returned to the Ancient Cloud Realm.

Going out of the Eternal Dao Realm is very simple, you can tear the boundary wall with your hands, but it is too difficult to get in, and you can only get in with the help of the Eternal Dao Boundary Stone.

......

"Use these Eternal Magic Crystals to complete the transformation of the Eternal Dao Body!"

Ye Tian began to retreat and cultivate, refining one Eternal Demon Crystal after another.

Gradually, Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Body Transformation Progress was getting higher and higher.

Millions of solstice years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian finally raised the Eternal Dao Body Transformation to the Ninety Percent Nine Realm, and was about to completely complete the Eternal Dao Body Transformation.

Another time passed.

Rumble!!!!

The transformation of the Eternal Dao Body was completely completed, and his body began to truly transform into a perfect-level Eternal Dao Body "One One Three", and his aura became extremely powerful.

"I have finally completed the transformation of the Eternal Dao Body, and now my Perfect-level Eternal Dao Body is just getting started, but its strength is more than several times stronger than in the past!" Ye Tian said darkly.

Other than that.

In the past millions of Dao Era years, he has also collected more Eternal Demon Crystals, and has also found a lot of good things, and the number of resources has far exceeded more than 100,000 Nine-Pole Points, and even exceeded 1 million Nine-Pole Points.

However, he still has not found the Eternal Decree.

"I've copied so many bodies, and I've been looking for so long, but I haven't found the Eternal National Order, this thing really depends on luck!" Ye Tian thought.

But.

He could stay in the Eternal Dao Realm all the time, and he was very patient, he didn't believe that he had never been able to find the Eternal Decree.

Other than that.

His Eternal Dao Boundary Stone had long since shattered, but it didn't affect him.

He didn't need to enter the Eternal Dao Realm again, as long as the replica body of the Eternal Dao Realm did not fall at the same time.

In this way, another few million years of the Solstice Era passed.

Ye Tian let a replica body go out with these resources again, and took out some resource treasures that would help the transformation of the Eternal Dao body to exchange them for treasures that would help improve resources.

Suddenly, many members of the Nine Extremes Alliance were willing to exchange with him.

Coupled with the resources he usually found by himself, after continuous refining, his cultivation was also progressing step by step towards the peak of the Eternal Dao Realm.

According to his current rate of progress, at most another ten million Dao Era years, he would be able to break through to the peak realm of the Eternal Dao Realm.

......

Eternal Dao Realm.

this day.

A copy of Ye Tian's body was fighting against a terrifying Eternal Demon Spirit, this Eternal Demon Spirit was very powerful, if the Eternal Dao Body Transformation was not completed, he would definitely not be an opponent.

But now, he has the strength to crush the other party.

Thundered!!!!

Ye Tian and his death, the battle fluctuated, and passed around.

Everywhere the area was shattered, and a mountain peak in the far distance exploded, turning into countless fragments.

And in one of the fragments, a token attracted Ye Tian's attention, and even caused him to make a mistake and be hit by the Eternal Demon Spirit, but he didn't care.

"That's the Eternal Decree!!"

Ye Tian was excited.

He had been searching for the Eternal Order for so long, but he didn't expect to find it in the middle of the battle.

"Gotta fix it quickly!"

Ye Tian fought desperately, and quickly solved this eternal demon spirit.

Immediately, he came to the Eternal Decree and grabbed it.

"It is indeed an eternal national decree, exactly the same as in the records of the Nine Extremes Alliance!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Immediately.

Ye Tian's replica body went out with this Eternal State Decree.

Only when you take it out can you really belong to him.

......

Inside the Luoxia Pavilion.

Ye Tian began to study the Eternal State Decree, and he first refined this Eternal State Decree and recognized it as the master.

As time passed, this eternal decree was gradually refined by him and completely belonged to him.

At this time.

Ye Tian knew why the Eternal Kingdom Order could open up an Eternal Kingdom, and he even knew the secret of the Eternal Kingdom.

The Eternal Decree can actually mobilize the Origin Power of the Eternal Realm, and the Eternal Realm, where he is now, is a heaven and earth composed of countless Eternal Realms.

Dispel the Death Strip with the origin of the Eternal Realm and open up an Eternal Realm.

And after opening up the Eternal Kingdom, he will become the Lord of the Eternal Kingdom, and he can use the Eternal Kingdom to accelerate his cultivation, if he can completely control the Eternal Kingdom, and even use the Eternal Kingdom to comprehend the origin of the Eternal Kingdom, he is expected to impact a higher realm......

As for how to completely control the eternal kingdom, it does not mean that it is just to open it up.

For example, the Lord of the Ogu Kingdom did not completely control the Ogu Kingdom in the first place, he was just equivalent to the executor, and he was the lowest level of the Lord of the Kingdom.

Only the lord of the kingdom who controls the kingdom is a high-level lord of the kingdom.

And if you want to completely control the Eternal Realm, you need to grow the Eternal Realm step by step, and your strength needs to reach the limit of the true Eternal Dao Realm, and then thoroughly refine the Eternal Decree and comprehend the origin of the Eternal Realm in the depths of the Eternal Decree.

In this way, you can truly control the eternal kingdom.

If the Agu Kingdom Lord had done it at the beginning, he would have even had a glimmer of hope to surpass the Eternal Dao Realm, but it was obviously too difficult to do this, and the Augu Kingdom Lord would have given up.

"It's hard to completely control the Eternal Kingdom, so don't think about it for now. "

"The next step is to raise the cultivation to the peak of the Eternal Dao Realm!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, in the next years of the Supreme Dao Era, he used various resources to improve his cultivation, and his cultivation also improved rapidly.

Finally this day.

His cultivation had finally reached the peak realm of the Eternal Dao Realm.

"Finally a breakthrough!"

Ye Tian was quite excited.

Eternal to the peak realm of the Dao Realm 4.8 realm, he can't continue to improve in cultivation at present, but the Eternal Dao Body can continue to improve.

"My current Eternal Dao Body is just getting started, if I want to continue to improve, it is extremely difficult, I need to collect some resources that will help improve the Eternal Dao Body, I have found some in the Eternal Dao Realm, but the number is not enough. Next, we have to have some resources of this kind in the Eternal Dao Realm!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

In the years that followed, his energy was still focused on the Eternal Dao Realm.

Eternal Crystals, all kinds of resources, are his goals.

Of course, it would be nice to be able to find a second Eternal Decree.

But it's a pity that he found an eternal decree is already a burst of luck, and if he wants to find another eternal decree, I don't know how long it will be.
